title: eleocharis decoriglumis
intro: Eleocharis decoriglumis, also known as the spike-rush, is a type of flowering plant in the sedge family. It is used in traditional medicine, particularly in Asian countries, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Eleocharis decoriglumis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and rhizomes are typically dried and used to make teas, infusions, or decoctions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
